creator: taguchi@tohoku.iij.ad.jp
text:
Here is a update patch for japanese/tk80 8.0.5jp1.6 -> 1.7
This patch fix some XIM related probrems.

Fix: Would you like to commit following patch to japanese/tk80.
Thanks.
